title: Frontend UI - AI Analysis Panel, Recommendation Card, and Market Sentiment Display
description: Build frontend UI components for AI stock analysis display: AIAnalysisPanel expandable panel, RecommendationCard for individual stock recommendations, MarketSentimentBadge for sector sentiment, AIFactorsList for key factors, and AIRecommendationModal wrapper.

files.change: Create AIAnalysisPanel component: expandable panel/drawer showing AI analysis for selected stock. Contains RecommendationCard, MarketSentimentBadge, AIFactorsList. Follows chartModalVisible pattern with useState.
Create RecommendationCard: displays recommendation (买入/持有/卖出/观望), confidence percentage, risk level badge, technical/sentiment/event/news scores as progress bars
Create MarketSentimentBadge: shows sector sentiment (bullish/bearish/neutral) with color coding and percentage
Create AIFactorsList: displays key factors influencing the recommendation with positive/negative indicators
Create AIRecommendationModal: modal wrapper for AI analysis, integrates AIAnalysisPanel with close handling
Integrate AIAnalysisPanel into WatchlistPage, add AI analysis trigger button per stock, add batch analysis option
Create aiAnalysisApi service with methods: getAnalysis(symbol), batchAnalyze(symbols), getAnalysisStatus(taskId), getMarketSentiment(), getCompanyEvents(symbol)

implementation: Create AIAnalysisPanel.tsx: expandable panel with animation, contains RecommendationCard, MarketSentimentBadge, AIFactorsList. Use useState for expanded/collapsed state following chartModalVisible pattern.
Create RecommendationCard.tsx: display recommendation badge (color-coded), confidence circle, risk level indicator, 4 score progress bars for technical/sentiment/event/news
Create MarketSentimentBadge.tsx: sector sentiment indicator with icon (bullish/bearish/neutral), percentage, and color coding
Create AIFactorsList.tsx: list of key factors with +/- indicators, truncate long lists with 'show more'
Create AIRecommendationModal.tsx: modal wrapper with backdrop, close button, keyboard escape handling
Create aiAnalysisApi.ts: API service calling backend endpoints with proper TypeScript types
Update WatchlistPage.tsx: add AIAnalysisPanel state, 'Analyze' button per stock row, 'Batch Analyze' button in header
Write unit tests for all components with React Testing Library

reference.pattern: Follow existing component patterns in frontend/src/components/, use existing API service pattern from watchlistApi.ts
reference.examples: chartModalVisible pattern for state management, existing card component styling

criteria: RecommendationCard displays all 4 score types with progress bars
MarketSentimentBadge shows correct sentiment with color coding
AIFactorsList supports expand/collapse for long lists
AIRecommendationModal closes on backdrop click, escape key, and close button
WatchlistPage integration: AI button visible per stock, batch analyze accessible
All API calls use proper TypeScript types
Unit tests: test_AIAnalysisPanel, test_RecommendationCard, test_MarketSentimentBadge, test_AIFactorsList

rationale.chosen_approach: Build reusable components that can be used in multiple places (panel, modal, cards)
alternatives_considered: Single large component - rejected, harder to maintain and test
Direct inline in WatchlistPage - rejected, poor reusability
rationale.tradeoffs: More files but better maintainability and testability

manual_checks: Check color coding matches recommendation values
success_metrics: All unit tests pass with 100% success rate

risks.mitigation: Use shared TypeScript types, API service abstracts endpoint details
risks.fallback: Frontend uses mock data during backend development

risks.description: Large analysis result payload affecting page load
risks.mitigation: Lazy load AIAnalysisPanel, paginate if needed

interfaces: AIAnalysisResult: { recommendation, confidence, sentiment_score, technical_score, event_signals, news_impact, risk_level }
AIAnalysisPanelProps: { symbol: string, isOpen: boolean, onClose: () => void }
functions: async function getStockAnalysis(symbol: string): Promise<AIAnalysisResult> - fetch single stock analysis
async function batchAnalyzeStocks(symbols: string[]): Promise<{ task_id: string }> - initiate batch analysis
